It's great for the coolest battle aesthetic gamer outfits with how the luxury sparkly icy diamond gems glow and match the color of the mega power on the medal . Exclusive Elaine Neckless

Colar Elaine Exclusivo
Um colar dourado delicado e elegante, feito para alguém especial. Com acabamento em brilho PBR detalhado, ele traz um toque de sofisticação e elegância a qualquer visual. Uma peça simples, porém belíssima, criada para se destacar com estilo.

Fabricado por Exclusive Designs

Exclusive Elaine Necklace
A soft and elegant gold necklace made for someone who means a lot. Crafted with detailed PBR shine, it brings a warm and classy glow to any avatar. A simple yet beautiful piece designed to stand out with style.

items.name: ZiP_Chain ✨
items.description: Make a bold and modern statement with the Zip Chain Necklace, a unique layered piece designed to stand out. Featuring two stylish chains — one in a sleek silver tone and the other in a warm gold finish — this necklace creates a trendy mixed-metal look that elevates any outfit. The centerpiece showcases the word “ZIP” in a clean, contemporary design, symbolizing speed, confidence, and urban style.
